title: Define a welcome board at the opening of Monday
excerpt: I am looking to set up an identical welcome dashboard for all our employees when they open Monday. Is this possible? It seems to me that this is what we see on the video “creating efficient workflows teams love” here: ht…

posts.author: Adrien361 (Adrien)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to set up an identical welcome dashboard for all our employees when they open Monday. Is this possible? It seems to me that this is what we see on the video “creating efficient workflows teams love” here: https://www.elevatebymonday.com/recap?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_the_date

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Adrien361 !

The ability to designate a specific dashboard as your account’s homepage is only available on Enterprise plans.

For anyone who is on an Enterprise Plan, the admin needs to go to the general tab > click account > account home page. From there they can designate which dashboard is the home page.

For all other plans, the logic behind the first board that appears on the account is based on the first board you created. If that board was deleted, then it will bring you to your inbox instead.

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: Adrien361 (Adrien)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
